item.title: Why your stuff may cost more than you think
item.description: A practical look at how everyday items can add up, with simple ways to stay organized and make more intentional choices.

media:content.media:title: Why your stuff may cost more than you think
media:content.media:description: A practical look at how everyday items can add up, with simple ways to stay organized and make more intentional choices.

item.title: The $300 Wake-Up Call
item.description: A simple reminder that small oversights can add up. That Practical Mom shares a practical takeaway for staying organized and avoiding repeat mistakes.

media:content.media:title: The $300 Wake-Up Call
media:content.media:description: A simple reminder that small oversights can add up. That Practical Mom shares a practical takeaway for staying organized and avoiding repeat mistakes.

item.title: Fix Your Attention Span
item.description: Simple tips to help you refocus and stay on task with more ease.

media:content.media:title: Fix Your Attention Span
media:content.media:description: Simple tips to help you refocus and stay on task with more ease.

item.title: One simple step for a no-buy plan
item.description: A practical tip from That Practical Mom to help keep a no-buy plan on track with a simple, realistic step.

media:content.media:description: A practical tip from That Practical Mom to help keep a no-buy plan on track with a simple, realistic step.
